title: Lycoctonum gigas

It belongs to the genus Lycoctonum, which is a group of plants closely related to the genus Aconitum. Lycoctonum gigas is a perennial herb, native to the mountainous regions of China and Central Asia. The plant's classification is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower structure. It is a member of the Ranunculales order, a group of flowering plants that are often found in temperate and alpine regions.
